arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp tipped for shock return to management after Liverpool exit
arts.sum: The German left Liverpool at the end of last season after nine years in charge on Merseyside

arts.ttl: Who Liverpool should sign if Salah, Van Dijk and Alexander-Arnold leave
arts.sum: Liverpool could lose three of their best players this summer. Who should they target in the transfer window? By WhoScored Trent Alexander-Arnold is expected to leave for Real Madrid this summer, with Liverpool likely to dip into the market to secure a new right-back. They will need to sign a full-back capable of replicating Alexander-Arnold’s attacking threat, which will prove easier said than done. The 26-year-old has set up six goals and 51 shooting chances for teammates this season, making him one of the most creative defenders in the league. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Football news: Ruben Amorim fires shot at Man Utd flops as Mo Salah open to Saudi move

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man United battling Liverpool for transfer of 19-year-old rising star
arts.sum: Manchester United look to be showing an increasing interest in the potential transfer of highly-rated young Como winger Assane Diao. Sources with a close understanding of the player’s situation have informed CaughtOffside that he’s attracting interest from Man Utd, Liverpool and Newcastle ahead of the summer. arts.ttl: Saudi clubs confident Liverpool star ‘remains interested’ in transfer this summer
arts.sum: There is reportedly confidence in Saudi Arabia that Liverpool star Mohamed Salah ‘remains interested’ in a transfer there this summer. The Egypt international is edging ever closer to the end of his contract at Liverpool, so could be just two months away now from becoming a free agent.
